title: Studio Ghibli Species
description: A species classification of a character or creature in the Studio Ghibli films.

id.description: Unique identifier representing a specific species.

eye_colors.description: Comma-separated list of eye colours observed within the species.
eye_colors.example: Black, Blue, Brown, Grey, Green, Hazel

hair_colors.description: Comma-separated list of hair colours observed within the species.

people.description: Characters that belong to this species.

films.description: Films in which this species appears.

url.description: Canonical URL of the species resource.
